item.description: The Supreme Court is rejecting President Trump's attempt to fire Federal Reserve board member Lisa Cook, but did grant him more power over other independent federal agencies in a separate decision. NBC News' Laura Jarrett reports on the two rulings and how the justices differed in their views of the president's authority.

media:content.media:title: Supreme Court rules Trump cannot fire Fed member Lisa Cook
media:content.media:description: The Supreme Court is rejecting President Trump's attempt to fire Federal Reserve board member Lisa Cook, but did grant him more power over other independent federal agencies in a separate decision. NBC News' Laura Jarrett reports on the two rulings and how the justices differed in their views of the president's authority.

item.title: Supreme Court rules Trump cannot fire Fed member Lisa Cook

item.description: President Trump voiced his opposition to the Supreme Court's ruling that will allow mail-in ballots that arrive late to be counted if they were sent before Election Day. The president claimed the ruling "gives people more time to vote illegally," while calling for Congress to pass election reform legislation.

media:content.media:title: Trump responds to Supreme Court ruling on mail-in ballots
media:content.media:description: President Trump voiced his opposition to the Supreme Court's ruling that will allow mail-in ballots that arrive late to be counted if they were sent before Election Day. The president claimed the ruling "gives people more time to vote illegally," while calling for Congress to pass election reform legislation.

item.title: Trump responds to Supreme Court ruling on mail-in ballots

item.dc:creator: Lawrence Hurley
item.description: The court left in place the jury’s finding that Trump sexually abused Carroll in the 1990s and later defamed her after she went public with her claims.

media:content.media:description: E. Jean Carroll arrives at Manhattan federal court for the second defamation trial against former President Donald Trump, in Manhattan, on Jan. 17, 2024.

item.title: Supreme Court rejects Trump’s push to overturn $5 million E. Jean Carroll verdict

item.dc:creator: Lawrence Hurley
item.description: The case involving a Virginia bank robbery is the latest example of the justices wrestling with how to apply constitutional protections to new technology.

media:content.media:text: An illustration depicting a yellow hand holding a yellow gavel, hitting the top of a red location pin, and the background is a pink overlay of a U.S. map
media:content.media:description: "Geo-fence warrants" allow law enforcement to get broad cell location data, even without suspects in mind.

item.title: Supreme Court rules broad cellphone location data sweeps require warrants

item.dc:creator: Lawrence Hurley
Dareh Gregorian
item.description: The choice leaves intact the landmark 1964 New York Times v. Sullivan ruling, which recognized protections for news media covering public figures.

media:content.media:description: Famed attorney Alan Dershowitz asked the Supreme Court to revisit the landmark 1964 ruling New York Times v. Sullivan, but the high court shot him down.

item.title: Supreme Court declines to hear Alan Dershowitz appeal in defamation case

item.description: El gol que le hubiera dado la victoria a los alemanes gracias al cabezazo de Tah es anulado por una falta de Anton sobre el portero paraguayo Gill.

media:content.media:title: Gol anulado a Alemania en tiempos extra por obstrucción al portero
media:content.media:description: El gol que le hubiera dado la victoria a los alemanes gracias al cabezazo de Tah es anulado por una falta de Anton sobre el portero paraguayo Gill.

item.title: Gol anulado a Alemania en tiempos extra por obstrucción al portero

item.description: El futbolista del Arsenal recibió una gran asistencia de Bruno Guimarães y definió con categoría para darle a Brasil su primera ventaja en el partido.

media:content.media:title: Golazo de Gabriel Martinelli para adelantar a Brasil 2-1 sobre Japón
media:content.media:description: El futbolista del Arsenal recibió una gran asistencia de Bruno Guimarães y definió con categoría para darle a Brasil su primera ventaja en el partido.

item.title: Golazo de Gabriel Martinelli para adelantar a Brasil 2-1 sobre Japón

item.description: El mediocampista cobró el último disparo de la tanda y con un derechazo cruzado venció al arquero neerlandés para sellar el 3-2 y el pase de los "Leones del Atlas" a los 8vos, donde enfrentarán a Canadá. La "Naranja Mecánica" volvió a decir adiós.

media:content.media:title: ¡Épico! Así fue el penal decisivo de Saibari con el que Marruecos eliminó a Países Bajos del Mundial
media:content.media:description: El mediocampista cobró el último disparo de la tanda y con un derechazo cruzado venció al arquero neerlandés para sellar el 3-2 y el pase de los "Leones del Atlas" a los 8vos, donde enfrentarán a Canadá. La "Naranja Mecánica" volvió a decir adiós.

item.title: ¡Épico! Así fue el penal decisivo de Saibari con el que Marruecos eliminó a Países Bajos del Mundial

item.description: Tras empatar en tiempo regular con gol de último minuto, los "Leones del Atlas" se impusieron en la tanda de penales por 3-2 y firmaron la segunda sorpresa del Mundial en esta fase; sellaron su pase a los 8vos y se enfrentarán a uno de los anfitriones.

media:content.media:title: ¡Marruecos avanza! Vence en penales a Países Bajos y se cita con Canadá en los 8avos del Mundial
media:content.media:description: Tras empatar en tiempo regular con gol de último minuto, los "Leones del Atlas" se impusieron en la tanda de penales por 3-2 y firmaron la segunda sorpresa del Mundial en esta fase; sellaron su pase a los 8vos y se enfrentarán a uno de los anfitriones.

item.title: ¡Marruecos avanza! Vence en penales a Países Bajos y se cita con Canadá en los 8avos del Mundial

item.description: La afición paraguaya festejó con todo la histórica clasificación a los octavos de final. En Boston, los brasileños vivieron con intensidad el duelo ante Japón, mientras las aficiones de Marruecos y Países Bajos estan listos para su partido en Monterrey.

media:content.media:title: Paraguay celebra su pase a cuartos y Marruecos junto a Países Bajos encienden México
media:content.media:description: La afición paraguaya festejó con todo la histórica clasificación a los octavos de final. En Boston, los brasileños vivieron con intensidad el duelo ante Japón, mientras las aficiones de Marruecos y Países Bajos estan listos para su partido en Monterrey.

item.title: Paraguay celebra su pase a cuartos y Marruecos junto a Países Bajos encienden México

item.description: Nuestros expertos analizan la victoria de Brasil sobre Japón en los dieciseisavos de final y la sorpresiva eliminación de Alemania a manos de Paraguay, uno de los resultados más destacados de la jornada mundialista.

media:content.media:title: ¿Brasil confirma su candidatura y Paraguay firma la gran sorpresa? Nuestros expertos lo analizan
media:content.media:description: Nuestros expertos analizan la victoria de Brasil sobre Japón en los dieciseisavos de final y la sorpresiva eliminación de Alemania a manos de Paraguay, uno de los resultados más destacados de la jornada mundialista.

item.title: ¿Brasil confirma su candidatura y Paraguay firma la gran sorpresa? Nuestros expertos lo analizan

item.description: Cuando parecía que los africanos estaban eliminados, Talbi metió un centro espectacular al área, dondeapareció el defensa del Fulham como un centro delantero para elevarse y conectar un cabezazo letal que empató el partido al 91.

media:content.media:title: ¡Marruecos responde! Gol agónico de Issa Diop empata el partido ante Países Bajos en los 16avos
media:content.media:description: Cuando parecía que los africanos estaban eliminados, Talbi metió un centro espectacular al área, dondeapareció el defensa del Fulham como un centro delantero para elevarse y conectar un cabezazo letal que empató el partido al 91.

item.title: ¡Marruecos responde! Gol agónico de Issa Diop empata el partido ante Países Bajos en los 16avos

item.description: Tras una jugada tejida desde la mediacancha, Summerville puso el balón al centro para el delantero del Liverpool, quien no dudó en mandarlo a guardar con un potente disparo de derecha ante la salida del arquero; envió dedicatoria hasta el cielo.

media:content.media:title: Gol de Cody Gakpo enciende Monterrey y adelanta a Países Bajos ante Marruecos en los 16avos
media:content.media:description: Tras una jugada tejida desde la mediacancha, Summerville puso el balón al centro para el delantero del Liverpool, quien no dudó en mandarlo a guardar con un potente disparo de derecha ante la salida del arquero; envió dedicatoria hasta el cielo.

item.title: Gol de Cody Gakpo enciende Monterrey y adelanta a Países Bajos ante Marruecos en los 16avos

item.description: Gustavo Gómez, Orlando Gill y Julio Enciso celebran la victoria más grande en la historia de Paraguay en los mundiales, mientras que Alemania no ocultó su decepción con las declaraciones de Kai Havertz y Julian Nagelsmann.

media:content.media:title: Paraguay conmueve con sus declaraciones tras eliminar a Alemania en penales
media:content.media:description: Gustavo Gómez, Orlando Gill y Julio Enciso celebran la victoria más grande en la historia de Paraguay en los mundiales, mientras que Alemania no ocultó su decepción con las declaraciones de Kai Havertz y Julian Nagelsmann.

item.title: Paraguay conmueve con sus declaraciones tras eliminar a Alemania en penales

item.description: El capitán de Alemania, Joshua Kimmich da la cara por el equipo y es crítico ante el partido que dieron ante Paraguay, es consciente de merecer la eliminación en Boston.

media:content.media:title: Joshua Kimmich: “Si no logras ganar en 120 minutos, mereces quedar eliminado”
media:content.media:description: El capitán de Alemania, Joshua Kimmich da la cara por el equipo y es crítico ante el partido que dieron ante Paraguay, es consciente de merecer la eliminación en Boston.

item.title: Joshua Kimmich: “Si no logras ganar en 120 minutos, mereces quedar eliminado”

item.description: Entre lágrimas, abrazos y cantos, los jugadores paraguayos celebraron la hazaña en Boston, luego de vencer de manera inesperada a los teutones en la tanda de penales y conseguir el pase histórico a octavos de final del Mundial 2026.

media:content.media:title: Lo que no se vio en TV: así festejó Paraguay tras el pase histórico a 8vos del Mundial ante Alemania
media:content.media:description: Entre lágrimas, abrazos y cantos, los jugadores paraguayos celebraron la hazaña en Boston, luego de vencer de manera inesperada a los teutones en la tanda de penales y conseguir el pase histórico a octavos de final del Mundial 2026.

item.title: Lo que no se vio en TV: así festejó Paraguay tras el pase histórico a 8vos del Mundial ante Alemania

item.description: Revive la cardíaca tanda de penales (4-3) que le dio el pase a Paraguay. Desde la atajada inicial de Gill a Havertz, las fallas de Sanabria y Tah, el muro de Neuer ante Balbuena, hasta el penal definitivo de José Canale para firmar la hazaña guaraní.

media:content.media:title: La dramática tanda de penales completa donde Paraguay eliminó a Alemania en el Mundial
media:content.media:description: Revive la cardíaca tanda de penales (4-3) que le dio el pase a Paraguay. Desde la atajada inicial de Gill a Havertz, las fallas de Sanabria y Tah, el muro de Neuer ante Balbuena, hasta el penal definitivo de José Canale para firmar la hazaña guaraní.

item.title: La dramática tanda de penales completa donde Paraguay eliminó a Alemania en el Mundial

item.description: Brutal hot weather is stretching across more than half the country as record-setting temperatures and humidity target millions from the Midwest to the East Coast. Meanwhile, massive wildfires in Utah and Colorado are sparking thick plumes of smoke that can be seen from miles away. NBC News’ Shaquille Brewster reports from Chicago.

media:content.media:title: Around 162 million under heat alerts
media:content.media:description: Brutal hot weather is stretching across more than half the country as record-setting temperatures and humidity target millions from the Midwest to the East Coast. Meanwhile, massive wildfires in Utah and Colorado are sparking thick plumes of smoke that can be seen from miles away. NBC News’ Shaquille Brewster reports from Chicago.

item.title: Around 162 million under heat alerts

item.description: American rescuers pulled a baby from the rubble several days after the deadly double earthquakes in Venezuela. But hopes are fading for survivors still trapped. NBC News’ Camila Bernal reports.

media:content.media:title: Miraculous rescues days after deadly earthquakes
media:content.media:description: American rescuers pulled a baby from the rubble several days after the deadly double earthquakes in Venezuela. But hopes are fading for survivors still trapped. NBC News’ Camila Bernal reports.

item.title: Miraculous rescues days after deadly earthquakes

item.dc:creator: Corky Siemaszko
item.description: The American flag can have many meanings, whether hung on front porches or waved in parades and protests. To some, it’s also tied up with President Trump.

media:content.media:text: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.
media:content.media:description: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.

media:content.media:text: Bruce Watson sits on the front steps to his house, his dog lays on the path in front of him, and an American flag flies in front of the house
media:content.media:description: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.

media:content.media:text: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.
media:content.media:description: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.

media:content.media:text: A silhouette of the side profile of Dina Bannick at sunset outside
media:content.media:description: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.

media:content.media:text: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.
media:content.media:description: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.

media:content.media:text: A three-way split composite image of left, a face close up of a large wood carving statue of Donald Trump, center, David Cavannah sitting on top of a large log near other logs, and right, a wide view of a large wood carving statue of Donald Trump holding a sign that says "MAGA" with an American flag flying on a pole behind it
media:content.media:description: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.

media:content.media:text: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.
media:content.media:description: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.

media:content.media:text: Frank Chappell stands outside holding a blue flag with an insignia showing two horses, an eagle, and a ship in the center crest, text on the bottom on a red ribbon design reads "virtue, liberty, and indepence"
media:content.media:description: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.

media:content.media:text: Rebecca Dyer, stands in front of her home with a hand on her pregnant belly, an American flag can be seen flying in front of the house
media:content.media:description: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.

media:content.media:text: From left, Rebecca Dyer watches her two sons blowing bubble in their backyard outside
media:content.media:description: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.

media:content.media:text: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.
media:content.media:description: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.

media:content.media:text: Bruce Watson stands in front of an American flag
media:content.media:description: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.

media:content.media:text: Close up of two rows of red white and blue stars and tassles hanging from threads
media:content.media:description: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.

item.title: As the nation turns 250, many Americans say flying the Stars and Stripes is now a red flag

item.description: Fresh off the NBA Finals, teams are preparing for the 2026 draft where fresh talent will get to shine. NBC News' Marquis Francis reports on what to expect and how the Giannis Antetokounmpo trade is shaking up the league.

media:content.media:title: Game on: NBA prepares for 2026 draft
media:content.media:description: Fresh off the NBA Finals, teams are preparing for the 2026 draft where fresh talent will get to shine. NBC News' Marquis Francis reports on what to expect and how the Giannis Antetokounmpo trade is shaking up the league.

item.title: Game on: NBA prepares for 2026 draft

item.dc:creator: Samantha Elkins
item.description: As AI is adopted across industries, it’s also being taken up by scammers.

media:content.media:text: Six percent of respondents in a Gallup poll said they'd personally been scammed last year.
media:content.media:description: Six percent of respondents in a Gallup poll said they'd personally been scammed last year.

item.title: 12% of successful scams in 2025 used AI or deepfakes, according to poll of U.S. adults

item.dc:creator: Jonathan Dienst
item.description: The FBI in Connecticut said it arrested four men accused of stealing tens of thousands at a time from ATMs at rest stops along I-95 from Darien to New Haven.
item.title: ‘Jackpotting’ crew stole over $500,000 from ATMs along I-95 in Connecticut, FBI says

item.dc:creator: NBC Chicago
item.description: CBS Chicago said a reporter and photographer were preparing for a newscast when two men rushed toward them, shouting racial slurs at one of the journalists.

media:content.media:text: CBS Chicago news crew van attacked.
media:content.media:description: CBS Chicago news crew attacked near Adler Planetarium in Chicago.

item.title: Chicago news crew attacked near Adler Planetarium

item.dc:creator: Angela Yang
item.description: The KIDS Act received broad bipartisan support. But the legislation is expected to face challenges in the Senate.

media:content.media:text: A young boy plays a video game on a smartphone .
media:content.media:description: A young boy plays a video game on a smartphone in New York.

item.title: Kids online safety package clears House, drawing warnings from digital rights and tech groups
